description: Implement a KV Store-backed dynamic IP blocklist system in Splunk. Create a KV Store collection named 'ip_blocklist' with fields 'ip_address', 'threat_level', 'reason', and 'date_added', and a corresponding lookup definition named 'ip_blocklist_lookup'. Identify at least 3 source IPs in the 'security_logs' index exhibiting suspicious brute-force behavior and populate the 'ip_blocklist' collection with these entries. Create a saved search named 'Blocklist_Alert' that queries 'security_logs' and uses the 'ip_blocklist_lookup' to flag matching events. Log in to Splunk at http://localhost:8000 using 'admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!'.
